\tzpentry{ID3612}{Magnetic Helicity Functional Correction}
\paragraph{Canonical Statement.}
ID3612 introduces Magnetic Helicity Functional Correction as a source-extracted canonical equation candidate. The equation is promoted from the Tier A equation-source intake and remains pending source-context expansion, duplicate review against the earlier TZPID corpus, Wolfram normalization, symbol-key enrichment, and derivation/proof-lane construction.
\paragraph{Canonical Equation.}
\begin{equation} \mathcal{H}_M = \int_V \mathbf{A} \cdot \mathbf{B} \, d^3x \end{equation}
